1714220.name: Hanako: Honor & Blade - Founder's Edition
1714220.description:
Founder's Edition includes all item store items currently in the game and all future items and item classifications.* (See Note below). This includes new player classes, cosmetics, etc.

Any and all items available for purchase will always get added to this pack and will automatically be available in your loadout screen once live in the game.

Item Categories:
  • Future Player Classes (Beyond the starting 4 classes)
  • Player skins
  • Weapon skins
  • Helmets/hats
  • Sashimono (back banners)
  • Animation packs
  • Masks
  • Weapon trails/glows
  • Any additional customization categories added in the future.


Note: Exclusive items, such as a branded giveaway or items unlocked from any challenges or in-game events may or may not be included in this edition, at the sole discretion of the developers.
1714220.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
